questions.question: Explain the difference between a binary tree and a binary heap. Provide an example of each data structure.
questions.hint: Focus on the properties and operations of both data structures.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of traversing a binary tree using inorder, preorder, and postorder traversal methods? Explain your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the Big O notation and time complexity.

questions.question: Describe the properties of a binary search tree (BST). How can you balance a BST to maintain efficient search, insertion, and deletion operations?
questions.hint: Focus on the BST properties and balancing techniques.
